infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: DUB_AI uses Face ID to protect your health data and app access.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DUB uses your camera to photograph meals for your food log.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DUB accesses your photo library to attach meal photos.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: DUB_AI reads your health data (steps, workouts, sleep, heart rate) to provide personalized wellness coaching and tracking.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: DUB_AI writes workout and nutrition summaries to Apple Health so your data stays in sync across health apps.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: DUB_AI requests permission to track affiliate link interactions to improve product recommendations.

plugins.userTrackingPermission: DUB_AI requests permission to track affiliate link interactions to improve product recommendations.
